command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
pip3 install pytest --break-system-packages -q 2>&1 | tail -5
python3 -m pytest --version
python3 -c "import sys; print(sys.version)"
echo '=PYTHON_PKGS='
pip3 list 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'pytest|aiohttp|requests|pydantic|httpx' | head -20
ENDSSH
